text: The cool, dimly-lit hallway in the first image feels both serene and haunting, as if I am alone with my thoughts, adrift in the passage of time. When I enter the second room, the bold colors and curious displays provoke an awakening in me; the environment is playful, intellectual, and experimental. I feel a sense of curiosity, as if I am at the threshold of discovery, invited to contemplate the intersection between technology and humanity. The world here whispers possibilities, yet its unfamiliarity leaves me slightly unsettled, wondering what lies just beyond my understanding.
